Sid from Ice Age is a goofy, talkative ground sloth known for his big heart and even bigger personality. He has a lanky body, buck teeth, a long neck, and wide, slightly crossed eyes that give him a constantly silly expression.

Sid is clumsy, overly optimistic, and often gets on others’ nerves—especially his more serious companions
